title: APM: Octo Demo Payment Threats
description: Payment interception and redirect signals emitted by the Octo attack lab. Keeps only demo-safe payment metadata such as provider, status, brand, last4, risk score, and redirect URL.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' != null and ('Payment Interception' != null or 'Payment Redirect' != null or 'Payment Redirect URL' != null) | stats count as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, unique('Payment Risk Score') as RiskScores, unique('Payment Card Last4') as CardLast4 by 'Attack ID', 'Run ID', 'Payment Provider', 'Payment Redirect URL' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Explain the payment interception and redirect evidence for the selected Attack ID.
Which redirect URL and trace should an investigator pivot into first?
